# Code Block Test

The following code blocks contain what look like headings. These should **not** appear in the outline.

## C#

```csharp
public class Program
{
    // # Fake Heading

    public static void Main()
    {
        Console.WriteLine("## Another Fake Heading");
    }
}
```

## Bash

```bash
# This is a shell comment
echo "## Not a heading"
```

## Markdown Example

```markdown
# Fake H1

## Fake H2

### Fake H3
```

## Real Heading

This heading should appear.
